productDisplayName: Timex Expedition Men Blue Dial Watch T49780
description: Article Number: T49780Case style: Analogue watch with a stainless steel, circular case, has a fixed bezel with pointersDial style: Blue dial, has white and glow-in-the-dark markings, steel toned hour and minute hands with glow-in-the-dark inlays, yellow seconds hand with white accent, branding on the dialFeatures: Date aperture at the 3 hour mark and screw to reset the timeStrap style: Black and navy blue, water resistant, leather strap with stitched detail and a tang claspWater resistant up to 100 mComes in a signature Timex caseWarranty: 1 year from date of purchase
